allow: PowerShell($env_lines = Get-Content "e:\\CLAUDE\\CODE\\Projects\\Kanban Board\\.env"; $key = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=' }\) -replace '^SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=',''; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://wotelbmgctbbrnbqlorg.supabase.co/rest/v1/tickets?select=id,title,status&limit=3" -Headers @{ apikey = $key }; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)
